Package org.apache.juneau.http.response

Class HttpStatusLineBean

java.lang.Object
org.apache.juneau.http.response.HttpStatusLineBean
All Implemented Interfaces:
HttpStatusLine
public final class HttpStatusLineBean extends Object implements HttpStatusLine
Default immutable implementation of HttpStatusLine.

Create instances via the static factory methods:

// 200 OK HTTP/1.1 HttpStatusLine sl = HttpStatusLineBean.of(200, "OK"); // Custom protocol version (parsed) HttpStatusLine sl2 = HttpStatusLineBean.of("HTTP/2", 200, "OK"); // Custom protocol version (typed) HttpStatusLine sl3 = HttpStatusLineBean.of(HttpProtocolVersion.HTTP_2_0, 200, "OK");

Beta — API subject to change: This type is part of the next-generation REST client and HTTP stack (org.apache.juneau.marshall.ng.*). It is not API-frozen: binary- and source-incompatible changes may appear in the next major Juneau release (and possibly earlier). For production use cases that require long-term binary stability, continue using the existing juneau-rest-client and juneau-rest-common APIs until the ng stack is declared stable.

See Also:
  • juneau-ng REST client
Since:
9.2.1

  • Method Details

    • of

      public static HttpStatusLineBean of(int statusCode, String reasonPhrase)
      Creates an HTTP/1.1 status line with the given status code and reason phrase.
      Parameters:
      statusCode - The HTTP status code (e.g. 200).
      reasonPhrase - The reason phrase (e.g. "OK"). May be null.
      Returns:
      A new instance. Never null.

    • of

      public static HttpStatusLineBean of(String protocolVersion, int statusCode, String reasonPhrase)
      Creates a status line with a parsed protocol version, status code, and reason phrase.
      Parameters:
      protocolVersion - The protocol version string (e.g. "HTTP/2"). Must not be null.
      statusCode - The HTTP status code.
      reasonPhrase - The reason phrase. May be null.
      Returns:
      A new instance. Never null.

    • of

      public static HttpStatusLineBean of(HttpProtocolVersion protocolVersion, int statusCode, String reasonPhrase)
      Creates a status line with the given typed protocol version, status code, and reason phrase.
      Parameters:
      protocolVersion - The protocol version. Must not be null.
      statusCode - The HTTP status code.
      reasonPhrase - The reason phrase. May be null.
      Returns:
      A new instance. Never null.

    • getStatusCode

      public int getStatusCode()
      Description copied from interface: HttpStatusLine
      Returns the HTTP status code (e.g. 200, 404).
      Specified by:
      getStatusCode in interface HttpStatusLine
      Returns:
      The status code.

    • getReasonPhrase

      public String getReasonPhrase()
      Description copied from interface: HttpStatusLine
      Returns the human-readable reason phrase (e.g. "OK", "Not Found"), or null if absent.
      Specified by:
      getReasonPhrase in interface HttpStatusLine
      Returns:
      The reason phrase, possibly null.

    • getProtocolVersion

      public HttpProtocolVersion getProtocolVersion()
      Description copied from interface: HttpStatusLine
      Returns the HTTP protocol version (e.g. HttpProtocolVersion.HTTP_1_1).
      Specified by:
      getProtocolVersion in interface HttpStatusLine
      Returns:
      The protocol version. Never null.
